tagline: Sonoma County insulation and general contracting since 2001
seoDescription: California State Insulation is a licensed Santa Rosa insulation and general contractor serving Sonoma County since 2001. Insulation, drywall, stucco and more.
heroHeading: Licensed Santa Rosa insulation and general contracting
heroSubheading: Run by Alvaro Beltran since 2001, California State Insulation handles insulation alongside framing, drywall, stucco and plaster for homes and businesses across Sonoma County.
highlights: Serving Santa Rosa and Sonoma County since 2001
Licensed CSLB #795223 — Insulation & Acoustical (C-2) and General Building (B)
Insulation plus full general contracting: framing, drywall, stucco, plaster
aboutBody: California State Insulation & General Contractor has worked out of Santa Rosa since 2001. Owner Alvaro Beltran built the company on insulation work and grew it into a full general contracting operation, holding both the C-2 Insulation and Acoustical and the B General Building classifications under California license #795223.

From the shop on Tapadera Drive, the crew serves homeowners and businesses across Sonoma County. Beyond insulation, they take on framing, stucco, interior plaster, drywall, concrete and demolition — handling the building envelope and the work around it on the same job.

services.title: Insulation
services.description: Insulation installation for residential and commercial buildings under the company's C-2 Insulation and Acoustical license.

services.title: Framing
services.description: Structural framing as part of new construction, additions and remodels.

services.title: Stucco
services.description: Exterior stucco application for new builds and repairs.

services.title: Interior Plaster & Drywall
services.description: Interior plaster and drywall installation and finishing.

services.title: Concrete
services.description: Concrete work for foundations, slabs and related construction.

services.title: Demolition
services.description: Demolition to prepare sites for new construction and remodels.

notes: VERIFIED active and licensed. CSLB RESULT: License #795223, status Active when last checked, classifications Insulation and Acoustical (C-2) and General Building (B); the business is bonded ($15,000 bond via Hudson Insurance per BuildZoom). Established/started locally 5/16/2001 (BuildZoom, MerchantCircle). Owner/manager: Alvaro Beltran (BuildZoom, Manta, Blue Book). Address 1244 Tapadera Dr, Santa Rosa, CA 95407; phone (707) 546-3177. Services list (insulation, framing, stucco, interior plaster, drywall, concrete, demolition) per The Blue Book listing ('Insulation Contractors—Cold & Heat'). Hours Mon–Fri 7am–5pm per directory listing. SOURCES: BuildZoom (buildzoom.com/contractor/california-state-insulation-and-general-contractor), The Blue Book (thebluebook.com iProView 1025598), BBB (bbb.org Santa Rosa profile 1116-538834 — BBB file opened 6/26/2015, NOT accredited, no BBB rating issued), MerchantCircle, Yellowpages, Manta, Procore, Facebook (facebook.com/CalstateInsulation/). UNVERIFIABLE: NO company website found (confirmed none — email is calstate707@gmail.com). NO real customer review quotes obtainable — BBB has no rating, no Yelp profile surfaced for this exact business, and BBB/BuildZoom/Blue Book/Facebook pages all returned HTTP 403 to direct fetch — so testimonials intentionally left EMPTY rather than invent any. Could NOT confirm specific insulation sub-services (batt vs blown-in vs spray foam), Title 24/energy work, attic/wall/floor specifics, weatherization, removal, or service-area boundaries — left generic. NO clearly-theirs photos obtainable (no website; social/directory image hosts blocked) so realPhotoUrls is EMPTY. DISAMBIGUATION: this is the Santa Rosa Sonoma County company at 1244 Tapadera Dr / (707) 546-3177 / Alvaro Beltran / CSLB #795223 — distinct from other 'insulation' firms in Santa Rosa (Coast Insulation, Insulation Solutions, North Bay Pacific, Verdin, Apperson, B & D, Santa Rosa Insulation & Fireproofing).
